{{Event Header|StS2 Amalgamator.png}} {{E|Amalgamator|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Hive}}. == Options == {{Frame|Combine Strikes}} {{TS|negative||Remove 2 {{C|Strike (Ironclad)|Strikes|2}}.}} {{TS|positive||Add {{C|Ultimate Strike||2}} to your Deck.}}
{{Frame|Combine Defends}} {{TS|negative||Remove 2 {{C|Defend (Ironclad)|Defends|2}}.}} {{TS|positive||Add {{C|Ultimate Defend||2}} to your Deck.}} == Conditions == * Only appears if you have at least 2 Strike cards and 2 Defend cards in your deck. == Dialogue ==
{{Frame|Combine Strikes}}
CLANG! CLANG!!! The Amalgamator strikes its Bone Anvil. Memories of combat, attacking, and offensive strategies sharpen with each blow. Your most ultimate technique returns to you.
{{Frame|Combine Defends}}
CLANG! CLANG!!! The Amalgamator strikes its Bone Anvil. Memories of combat, protecting, and defensive strategies sharpen with each blow. Your most ultimate technique returns to you.
